task_completion.description: Verify that the basic utility information (Name, Type, and ID/Alias) is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CAMEO Data Manager resource form, the 'Name' field contains 'Pacific Gas and Electric Company', the 'Type' field shows 'Electric & Gas Utility', and the 'ID/Alias' field contains 'PG&E'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the address information is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields contain '77 Beale Street' for the street, 'San Francisco' for the city, 'CA' for the state, and '94105' for the zip code.

task_completion.description: Verify that the phone and emergency phone numbers are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Phone' field contains '1-800-743-5000' (or '800-743-5000') and the 'Emergency Phone' or '24-Hour' field contains '1-800-743-5002' (or '800-743-5002').

task_completion.description: Verify that the contact person and title are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Contact Person' field contains 'Maria Gonzalez' and the 'Title' field contains 'Emergency Coordination Manager'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific notes are entered into the Notes field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Notes' text area contains the text: 'Covers electric and natural gas service for Jefferson County. Can dispatch field crews for emergency gas shutoff within 30 minutes. Coordinates with county EOC on Channel 7.'

task_completion.description: Verify that the new utility resource record has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved, or the CAMEO Data Manager list view showing 'Pacific Gas and Electric Company' added as a new entry in the resources/utilities list.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Data Manager application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface, not a generic text editor, terminal window, or script output.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GUI to input the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show evidence of form filling, such as active cursors in text boxes, highlighted fields, or dropdown menus being interacted with.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the success state using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface styling, fonts, and layout should remain consistent with the standard CAMEO Data Manager application without out-of-place text overlays or broken CSS.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pacific Gas and Electric Company (PG&E) is a real utility in CA. Verified phone numbers: Customer Service is 1-800-743-5000, 24-hour Emergency/Outage is 1-800-743-5002. Note: The task specifically requires entering the address '77 Beale Street, San Francisco, CA 94105' and the synthetic contact 'Maria Gonzalez', even though PG&E's real headquarters has moved and the contact is synthetic. Score strictly based on the exact details requested in the prompt being entered into the application.
